---
title: "Divya's Mystic Sanctuary"
---

<div class="hero">

<img src="images/logo.jpg" class="logo"/>

# Mystic Guidance

### Tarot • Reiki • Crystal Ball Reading

<div class="subtitle">

Discover clarity, healing and spiritual guidance.

</div>

<div class="scroll">

Click Anywhere to Begin

</div>

</div>
---

```{}
```
